name: Strava
description: Most-recent Strava activity. The install flow prompts for a `STRAVA_TOKEN` (Bearer; the public Strava `POST /oauth/token` exchange is documented in the widget skill). The http source calls `GET /athlete/activities?per_page=1` and projects the first entry's `name` / `distance` / `type`. 1x1 is the distance as a meters bignum with the activity type as the subtitle; 2x2 adds the activity title underneath.
